mapper.select:
SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, NAME AS name, PHONE AS phone, ROLE AS role FROM USER_INFO
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND RIGHT(REPLACE(REPLACE(PHONE,'-',''),' ',''),4)=#{keyword} AND MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
ORDER BY NAME ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOAN WHERE BOOK_ID=#{bookId} AND MEMBER_ID=#{memberId} AND STATUS IN ('ACTIVE','PENDING')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOAN (BOOK_ID, MEMBER_ID, LOAN_DATE, RETURN_DATE, STATUS) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{memberId}, #{loanDate}, #{returnDate}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT L.LOAN_ID AS loanId, L.BOOK_ID AS bookId, B.TITLE AS bookTitle, B.AUTHOR AS bookAuthor, B.CATEGORY AS bookCategory, L.LOAN_DATE AS loanDate, L.RETURN_DATE AS returnDate, L.STATUS AS status FROM LOAN L JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID=B.BOOK_ID WHERE L.MEMBER_ID=#{memberId} AND L.STATUS IN ('ACTIVE','PENDING') ORDER BY L.LOAN_ID DESC

SELECT L.LOAN_ID AS loanId, L.BOOK_ID AS bookId, B.TITLE AS bookTitle, L.LOAN_DATE AS loanDate, L.RETURN_DATE AS returnDate, L.STATUS AS status FROM LOAN L JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID=B.BOOK_ID WHERE L.MEMBER_ID=#{memberId} AND L.STATUS IN ('ACTIVE','PENDING') ORDER BY L.LOAN_ID DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.update: UPDATE LOAN SET STATUS='PENDING' WHERE LOAN_ID=#{loanId} AND STATUS='ACTIVE'
UPDATE LOAN SET STATUS='RETURNED', ACTUAL_RETURN_DATE=#{actualReturnDate} WHERE LOAN_ID=#{loanId}
mapper.select: SELECT L.LOAN_ID AS loanId, L.BOOK_ID AS bookId, B.TITLE AS bookTitle, B.AUTHOR AS bookAuthor, L.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, U.NAME AS memberName, U.PHONE AS memberPhone, L.LOAN_DATE AS loanDate, L.RETURN_DATE AS returnDate FROM LOAN L JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID=B.BOOK_ID JOIN USER_INFO U ON L.MEMBER_ID=U.MEMBER_ID WHERE L.STATUS='PENDING' ORDER BY L.LOAN_ID ASC

SELECT L.LOAN_ID AS loanId, L.BOOK_ID AS bookId, B.TITLE AS bookTitle, L.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, U.NAME AS memberName, L.LOAN_DATE AS loanDate, L.RETURN_DATE AS returnDate, L.STATUS AS status FROM LOAN L JOIN BOOK B ON L.BOOK_ID=B.BOOK_ID JOIN USER_INFO U ON L.MEMBER_ID=U.MEMBER_ID WHERE L.STATUS IN ('ACTIVE','PENDING') ORDER BY L.LOAN_ID DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT B.BOOK_ID AS bookId, B.TITLE AS title, B.AUTHOR AS author, B.PUBLISHER AS publisher, B.CATEGORY AS category, B.STATUS AS status, COUNT(L.LOAN_ID) AS loanCount FROM BOOK B LEFT JOIN LOAN L ON B.BOOK_ID = L.BOOK_ID AND L.LOAN_DATE >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') AND L.LOAN_DATE < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY B.BOOK_ID, B.TITLE, B.AUTHOR, B.PUBLISHER, B.CATEGORY, B.STATUS ORDER BY loanCount DESC, B.BOOK_ID ASC LIMIT 30
